title: Crafting recipe definition (v1)
description: A single crafting recipe file under data/recipes/. A blacksmith turns the listed materials plus gold into one copy of the output item via the CRAFT command.

name.description: Human-readable recipe name, typically the output item's name.

output_item.description: Id of the item (data/items/<id>.json) produced on a successful craft.

gold_cost.description: Gold consumed by the craft. Defaults to 0 when omitted.

min_skill.description: Minimum profession level (blacksmithing/alchemy/cooking, depending on which crafter offers the recipe) required to attempt the craft. Defaults to 0 (craftable by anyone) when omitted, preserving backward compatibility with recipes that predate proficiency levels.

proficiency_gain.description: Proficiency points granted in the relevant profession on a successful craft. Crossing a multiple of 100 points raises the profession level. Defaults to 25 when omitted.

materials.description: Material items consumed by the craft. Every entry must be present in the crafter's inventory in the given quantity.

item.description: Id of the required material item (data/items/<id>.json).

quantity.description: How many copies of the material the craft consumes. Defaults to 1 when omitted.
